title: Protocol 4 EPIC-WE Practical Protocol for  Cultural Game Jams in Glocal  Sites (Final Protocol)
author: Somers Miles, Rachel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The EPIC-WE Practical Protocol for Cultural Game Jams in Glocal Sites is a comprehensive guide designed to facilitate the planning, execution, and evaluation of Cultural Game Jams (CGJs). These events merge game design with cultural heritage, European values, and youth participation to foster innovative, inclusive, and meaningful  cultural interventions. Rooted in co-creation and participatory design principles, the  protocol offers structured approaches for cultural institutions, creative industries  partners, higher education institutions, and youth citizens to collaborate in creating  culturally rich and socially relevant game experiences.
